use_cases: Displaying status labels or tags on content items
Labeling categories or metadata in lists and cards
Highlighting featured or new items with visual emphasis
Providing context through color-coded informational badges
ai_summary: A versatile badge component from Coss featuring multiple size variants (default, lg, sm) and semantic variants (default, destructive, error, info, outline, secondary). Built with Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority for consistent styling, it includes hover states for interactive use in buttons and links, with responsive sizing and accessible focus states. Clean, flat design suitable for any SaaS or content-heavy application.
